title: Zapier vs Custom Automation: Which Solution Scales Better for Your Business?
summary: Blog post comparing Zapier (a no-code platform connecting apps via 'Zaps') against custom-built automation. Zapier wins on setup speed, lower upfront cost, and a huge integration library (Salesforce, HubSpot, Shopify, Gmail, Slack, QuickBooks) for standard workflows. Custom automation wins on flexibility, scalability, full control, security/compliance, and handling complex business logic, legacy systems, or proprietary platforms that Zapier can't reach. Many businesses use a hybrid approach: Zapier for lightweight workflows, custom automation for mission-critical processes. The right choice depends on workflow complexity, how critical the automation is, and future growth plans, not just what's needed today.
